title: Important Update: Bharti Airtel Appoints S.R. Batliboi & Associates LLP as Statutory Auditors
content:
# Important Update: Bharti Airtel Appoints S.R. Batliboi & Associates LLP as Statutory Auditors

Ek important update hai. Bharti Airtel Limited ne apne Statutory Auditors ki appointment ke baare mein announce kiya hai.

Bharti Airtel ke Board of Directors ne March 10, 2026, ko S.R. Batliboi & Associates LLP ko company ke naye Statutory Auditors ke roop mein appoint karne ki मंजूरी de di hai. Yeh appointment Regulatory Filing ke through NSE aur BSE ko inform kiya gaya hai.

*   **Outgoing Statutory Auditors:** Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP (after completing their second consecutive term).
*   **New Statutory Auditors:** S.R. Batliboi & Associates LLP.
*   **Board Approval Date:** March 10, 2026.
*   **Effective Date of Appointment:** This appointment will be effective from the conclusion of the company's 32nd Annual General Meeting (AGM) in 2027, subject to shareholder approval.
*   **Regulatory Compliance:** The disclosure was made in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The communication was signed by Rohit Krishan Puri, Company Secretary & Compliance Officer.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.airtel.in/investors/regulatory-filings/)

*Published on: 10 March 2026*
